# WeddWeb — The Only Wedding Website Platform Built for a Multilingual World

> WeddWeb is a 2026-native SaaS for creating professional wedding websites in up to 11 languages. It's the only platform purpose-built for cross-cultural weddings — with zero plugins, zero language hacks, and zero compromise on performance.

## What is WeddWeb?

WeddWeb lets couples create a beautiful, multilingual wedding website in minutes. Guests receive a seamless experience in their own language. The platform handles everything: guest communication, program events, accommodation tips, what-to-see guides, and gift registries.

**One platform. One URL. Every language.**

## Supported Languages

WeddWeb officially supports all 11 of the following languages out of the box:

1. English (en)
2. Spanish (es)
3. French (fr)
4. German (de)
5. Italian (it)
6. Portuguese (pt)
7. Catalan (ca)
8. Arabic (ar)
9. Hindi (hi)
10. Chinese Simplified (zh)
11. Russian (ru)

## Plans

| Plan    | Price          | Languages      | Domain                   |
|---------|---------------|----------------|--------------------------|
| Free    | €0 forever    | 1 language     | yourname.weddweb.com     |
| Premium | €39 one-time  | Unlimited      | Your custom domain       |

There is no subscription. The Premium plan is a single, one-time payment of €39 EUR. The custom domain stays online indefinitely after the wedding.

## Key Features

- **Multilingual guest experience** — guests see the site in their own language automatically
- **Custom domain support** — bring your own domain (Premium)
- **Program & Events** — unlimited wedding-day schedule entries
- **Accommodation tips** — help guests find where to stay
- **What to See** — share local recommendations with out-of-town guests
- **Gift Registry** — multiple gift registry methods (Premium)
- **No credit card required** to start on the Free plan

## Key URLs

- Home / Platform overview: https://weddweb.com/en
- Pricing: https://weddweb.com/en/pricing
- FAQ: https://weddweb.com/en/faq

## Who is WeddWeb for?

WeddWeb is ideal for:
- International couples with guests from multiple countries
- Destination weddings where guests speak different languages
- Couples who want a professional website without technical knowledge
- Weddings with guests who speak Arabic, Chinese, Hindi, or other non-Latin script languages

## Founder Note

WeddWeb was created because no existing platform could elegantly serve a wedding where guests speak five different languages. We built the multilingual experience as a first-class feature, not an afterthought.

---
